PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?skyscraper ?skyscraperLabel ?developer ?developerLabel ?completionDate ?heightValue WHERE {
  ?skyscraper wdt:P31 wd:Q1146223 ; wdt:P2044 ?height ; wdt:P1019 ?developer .
  ?height wikibase:quantityAmount ?heightValue .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?skyscraper wdt:P1619 ?completionDate
  }
  ?skyscraper rdfs:label ?skyscraperLabel .
  ?developer rdfs:label ?developerLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?skyscraperLabel) , "en"))
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?developerLabel) , "en"))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?heightValue)
LIMIT 10
